title: Automation Origins
description: Learn to turn boring simple farms into something big and automatic!
body:
![CODE: BLU3 FOR 15% OF FIRST MONTH](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/654e5ef1cc4db999665e307a8a91fcf0f4cfe738_0.webp)
[Click here for More Info](https://billing.kinetichosting.com/aff.php?aff=330)

# Are you bored of regular minecraft farms?
## are you tired of the same biomes?
### is this set up boring?
If you awnsered yes to all 3... what you doing im a text box i can't hear you.

Say hello to automation origins!! turn that boring tnt tree farm into something new with the create mod! or maybe learn how to set up a coffee shop and trade your coffee to no one cause you have no friends! (just kiddding..... maybe. i dont know you!)

get some new cool new powers with the choice of origins and learn to adapt them in your gameplay!

will you explore the world? or will you settle down and make a huge factory for just getting coal? seriously why coal? atleast get diamonds or netherite!
